title: Zobomaze
body:
# Zobomaze (Zobomazé)

Denver experimental project; releases on own Bandcamp. Active across the Rhinoceropolis-era scene.

## Connection to Colin

Track 15 of REMIX10: **"ZOBOMAZE-DIRK GRUNWALD (special computer diamond science groove mix)"** — Colin's "special computer diamond science groove mix" of "Dirk Grunwald."
